(PHY).description: Uncertain if corrected for decay during irradiation

1K2.description: Modifier for Legendre or cosine coefficients of the form k**2 d-sig/d-Omega = Sum(a(L)*p(L)), where k = wave vector

2AG.description: times 2 * isotopic abund. and stat. weight factor

2L2.description: Modifier for Legendre or cosine coefficients of the form d-sig/d-Omega = (1/2)Sum((2L+1)*a(L)*p(L))

4AG.description: times 4 * isotopic abund. and stat. weight factor

AG.description: times isotopic abund. and stat. weight factor

AL1.description: Coefficients for first-order associated Legendre functions of the first kind

ASY.description: Asymmetry of polarization of outgoing particles

AYY.description: Tensor analyz.power,inc.proj.spin normal to scatt.plane Tensor analyzing power, incident projectile spin normal to scattering plane

AZZ.description: Tensor analyz.power,inc.proj.spin parall.to scatt.plane Tensor analyzing power, incident projectile spin parallel to beam direction in scattering plane

CS2.description: Coefficients of the form d-sig/d-Omega = a(0) + a(1)*sin**2(theta) + a(2)*sin**2(theta)*cos(theta) + a(3)*sin**2(theta)*cos**2(theta)

DMN.description: Divided by mass number of the target nuclide

L4P.description: Modifier for Legendre or cos coefficients of the form 4pi*d-sig/d-Omega =Sum((2L+1)*a(L)*p(L))

LIM.description: Modifier for a resonance integral given for a limited EN-range only

RAB.description: times natural isotopic abundance, divided by isotopic abundance of target of first term of REACTION sum

RNV.description: Non-1/v part of cross-section or resonance-integral

RS.description: Times 4pi/sigma Modifier for diff.cross-sections 4pi/sig d-sig/d-Omega and for Legendre or cosine coefficients of the form: (4pi/sig)*(d-sig/d-Omega) = Sum(a(L)*p(L))

RS0.description: Modifier for Legendre or cosine coefficients of the form: (d-sig/d-Omega)/(d-sig/d-Omega at 0 deg)=Sum(a(L)*p(L))

RSD.description: Modifier for Legendre or cosine coefficients of the form: (d-sig/d-Omega)/(d-sig/d-Omega at 90 deg) = = 1 +Sum(a(L)*p(L)) Also modifier for angular distributions of the form: sig(theta)/sig(90deg) and for the anisotropy-coeff sig(0)/sig(90deg)

RSL.description: Modifier for Legendre or cosine coefficients of the form: (4pi/sig)*(d-sig/d-Omega)=Sum((2L+1)*a(L)*p(L))

S2T.description: Coefficients of the form: d-sig/d-Omega = a(0) + a(1)*sin**2(theta) + a(2)*sin**2(2*theta)

TM.description: per 1 MeV target thickness (for thick target yields)

TMP.description: at temperature other than the room temperature

VGT.description: Vogt formalism for resonance parameters The following modifiers may be added to any quantity code without entry in Dictionary 36.  These general quantity modifiers must be coded after any modifier included in Dictionary 36.

(A).description: Uncertain if corrected for natural isotopic abund. Unclear whether corrected for natural isotopic abundance of target. To be used only when data are given for an isotope, but were measured on a target with natural isotopic composition. For enriched targets use modifier 'FCT' instead.

A.description: Data times natural isotopic abundance To be used only when data are given for an isotope, but were measured on a target with natural isotopic composition. For enriched targets use modifier 'FCT' instead.

DAM.description: Divided by atomic mass of the target nuclide

MSC.description: Approximate definition only, see REACTION text General purpose modifier for unusual data types. Exact definition is given in free text following the reaction code. Use with code from dict.36 which is closest to data given.

REL.description: Relative data To be combined with arbitrary units. Otherwise use 'FCT'.

BRS.description: Average over part of bremsstrahlung spectrum

MXW.description: Maxwellian average The appropriate spectrum temperature is to be given under data heading 'KT', or the mean energy under 'EN-MEAN' (if given by author) or 'EN-DUMMY' (if assumed by compiler). average'.
